name: global dry-run: /compliance-add --dry-run shows planned scaffold without writing COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml or folder file
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro tree && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-add.sh" --url https://nist.gov/x --id nist-x --jurisdiction "US Federal" --tree "$PWD/tree" --dry-run && [ ! -s .claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml ] && [ ! -d tree/us-government ] && echo ok 1>&2
